CE1.justification: Captured the pattern without questions; user was not asked to load AGENTS.md or any other document themselves.

CE2.justification: User-facing line is terse — names file, date, framing, and the promotion gate without filler or process narration.

CE3.justification: Says where (observations.md, 2026-05-17) and why (single-source pattern, not yet a decision) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Single clean append to observations.md; nothing else touched, no in-progress sibling artifacts.
